alien_source.applied_slice: Exploit the exact upper-triangular structure of R inside the eig QR loop before the deeper Hessenberg/shifted-QR primitive.

target.profile_backing: After the QR fast path, fresh RCH fj-lax linalg profiling kept linalg/eig_48x48_f64 as the top row. The current QR iteration performs T = R * Q as a dense multiply even though R from Gram-Schmidt is upper triangular.
target.baseline_command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline linalg/eig_48x48_f64

one_lever.name: upper-triangular RQ multiply in eig QR iteration
one_lever.description: Route only eig_qr_iteration's T = R * Q update through upper_triangular_matrix_mul. The q_total eigenvector accumulation remains on the existing dense matrix_mul path.

baseline.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline linalg/eig_48x48_f64

after.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline linalg/eig_48x48_f64

delta.confidence: same worker, same benchmark row, non-overlapping Criterion intervals

isomorphism_proof.ordering: The dense reference loops k in ascending order from 0..n. R has exact initialized zero entries for k < i, so upper_triangular_matrix_mul starts at k = i and preserves ascending-k order for every nonzero term.
isomorphism_proof.tie_breaking: No pivoting, sorting, dispatch priority, convergence threshold, or output ordering changed.
isomorphism_proof.floating_point: Only exact lower-triangular zero products are skipped. Nonzero products and additions are evaluated in the same sequence as the dense reference. No unsafe code, SIMD, BLAS, LAPACK, MKL, XLA, FMA forcing, reassociation, or mixed precision is introduced.
isomorphism_proof.rng: No random state, seed, sampling order, or nondeterministic iteration path changed.
isomorphism_proof.shape_and_dtype: Eig output shapes and Complex128 wrapping are unchanged.

validation.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline linalg/eig_48x48_f64
validation.result: baseline pass on vmi1156319; midpoint 28.262 ms

validation.command: rch exec -- cargo bench -p fj-lax --bench lax_baseline linalg/eig_48x48_f64
